channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: National Assembly and Senate to Form Mediation Committee Over Revenue Sharing Dispute
item.description: Kenya’s Parliament is set to establish a mediation committee after the National Assembly rejected amendments proposed by the Senate on the Division of Revenue Bill. The disagreement centres on how rev...

item.title: Russian Foreign Ministry Warns of Major Impending Strikes on Kiev Military Targets
item.description: The Russian Foreign Ministry issued a formal statement on May 25 announcing planned systematic strikes on Ukrainian military-industrial facilities in Kiev, including sites involved in drone design, pr...

item.title: Knicks sweep Cavaliers in Eastern Conference Finals to reach NBA Finals for first time since 1999
item.description: The New York Knicks delivered a commanding performance in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Finals, defeating the Cleveland Cavaliers 130-93 to complete a 4-0 series sweep and secure their first NBA Fi...

item.title: Ken Paxton Defeats John Cornyn in Texas GOP Senate Runoff Following Trump Endorsement
item.description: Republican Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton won the Texas Republican Senate runoff election against incumbent Senator John Cornyn, a result that political analysts said demonstrated former President ...

item.title: Court Ruling On Jonathan’s 2027 Eligibility, Party Primaries And Major Political Developments Dominate Nigerian Headlines
item.description: The major Nigerian newspaper headlines for Wednesday, 27th May 2026 focused mainly on political developments ahead of the 2027 general elections. One of the biggest stories na the Federal High Court r...

item.title: Sinner and Sabalenka advance to second round after straight-set wins at French Open
item.description: Jannik Sinner and Aryna Sabalenka start their French Open campaign on a strong note as both world number ones comfortably moved into the second round at Roland Garros. Sinner, who is currently on a ho...

item.title: Michael Jackson Makes Surprise Appearance on SMAP×SMAP in Japan in 2006
item.description: On May 31, 2006, Michael Jackson made an unexpected and highly memorable appearance on the popular Japanese variety show SMAP×SMAP, hosted by the iconic J-pop group SMAP. The segment, which later aire...

item.title: Cookware Companies Clash Over PFAS Advertising Claims and Chemical Safety
item.description: The cookware industry is facing a growing legal and public relations dispute centered on per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS), commonly known as “forever chemicals,” used in nonstick cookware. A...

item.title: Michael Wolff Speculates on Donald Trump’s Health and the Future of His Second Presidency
item.description: A recent article from Raw Story highlights comments made by journalist and Trump biographer Michael Wolff during an episode of the podcast 'Inside Trump's Head,' which he co-hosts with Daily Beast exe...

item.title: Democrat Johnny Garcia Wins Texas Primary After GOP-Linked PAC Backed Opponent
item.description: Democratic candidate Johnny Garcia won the Democratic primary runoff for Texas’s 35th Congressional District, defeating Maureen Galindo in a race that drew national attention because of controversial ...

item.title: Humanitarian groups warn Ebola outbreak could surpass previous deadliest records amid regional instability
item.description: An ongoing Ebola outbreak in Central and East Africa has raised serious global concern after humanitarian organizations warned it could become the deadliest recorded outbreak if current conditions per...

item.title: Hobbyist Builds Real-World Version of Windows Space Cadet Pinball Table
item.description: A hobbyist known as CNCDan is undertaking an ambitious project to recreate Microsoft's classic “3D Pinball for Windows – Space Cadet” as a fully physical pinball machine. Inspired by the nostalgic com...

item.title: CNN Analysts Say Trump’s Endorsement of Ken Paxton Could Force Republicans to Spend Heavily in Texas Senate Race
item.description: CNN commentators and political analysts discussed the potential political and financial consequences of President Donald Trump’s endorsement of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the Texas Republica...

item.title: Former Clients Accuse Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche of Malpractice, Forgery, and Excessive Legal Billing
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche is facing a malpractice lawsuit brought by former clients Adam and Daniel Kaplan, according to reports. The lawsuit alleges that Blanche, while working at the law ...

item.title: Ken Paxton defeats Sen. John Cornyn in Texas Republican primary runoff
item.description: Texas Republican Senator John Cornyn has lost his primary election in a closely watched and highly contentious runoff battle against state Attorney General Ken Paxton. The race, which had been tighten...

item.title: Pam Bondi Joins White House Science and Technology Advisory Council After Leaving Attorney General Post
item.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi is reportedly returning to the Trump administration after being removed from her previous position earlier in 2026. According to the report, Bondi will now serve on t...

item.title: Analyst warns U.S. involvement in Iran conflict may lead to strategic setback and long-term geopolitical consequences
item.description: The article discusses commentary from journalist Dan Rather, who warns that President Donald Trump could be facing a significant and potentially humiliating setback in the ongoing conflict in Iran. Ac...

item.title: Texas Republican voter says Trump endorsement pushed him to support John Cornyn over Ken Paxton
item.description: A Republican voter in Texas told CNN that President Donald Trump’s endorsement of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton influenced him to vote instead for Senator John Cornyn in the state’s Republican Sen...
